description_long: This is a small, purple cup with a rounded body and a thick, polygonal handle attached to one side. The cup features a prominent green circular emblem on its side, decorated with a hexagonal pattern and a dark zigzag line running through the center. The surface of the cup appears matte and slightly textured, giving it a soft, non-glossy look. The interior is hollow, designed to hold liquids, and the rim is thick and rounded for comfortable drinking. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped, making it easy to grip. There are no visible seams or additional components, and the cup does not have a lid.
description: A small, matte purple cup with a thick handle and a green patterned emblem on its side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green emblem with a zigzag pattern and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no emblem visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and the green emblem clearly visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing a plain purple surface with no handle or emblem visible.
